title: Create: Starbound
description: Starbound is a Modpack which allows immersive travel to space with Create.
body:
Starbound is a technalogically motivated modpack based on the Create Mod. It has semi-realistic crafting recipes and extensive processing lines. Starbound uses custom forks of mods (and completely custom mods) to acheve this. Starbound features a extensive questing system, with many rewards. At the moment, Starbound does not launch on MacOS. Linux is untested.

Please note that you must accept the Recource Downloader agreement to use FTB Quests.

When Create Aeronautics releases, a new version of this modpack will be released.
